summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Aetheris Spatial landing page redesign, global footer, and theme system. All 18 features tested and working correctly. Three.js dimensional particle visualization renders and cycles through 1D→2D→3D→4D. Theme toggle persists to localStorage. Footer appears on all pages except / and /admin as designed.
passed_tests: Landing page renders at / with hero heading 'Design Across Every Dimension'
Three.js canvas renders in hero section background
Dimensional particle visualization shows 1D line configuration
Dimension indicator label shows '1D — Line' initially
Dimension label cycles to '2D — Plane' after 6 seconds
Dimension progress dots (1D, 2D, 3D, 4D) visible at bottom of hero
CTA button 'Enter the Spatial' visible and clickable (triggers OAuth)
CTA button 'Explore Products' visible and clickable
Feature bento cards render: Multi-Dimensional Customization, AI Co-Designer, Sustainability Scored, Spatial-First Rendering, Design Vault
Global Footer renders with AETHERIS SPATIAL branding
Footer Privacy Policy link visible and navigates to /privacy
Footer Terms of Service link visible and navigates to /terms
Footer shows GDPR & CCPA Compliant text
Footer shows WCAG 2.2 AA Accessible text
Footer shows copyright year 2026
Footer Admin link visible and navigates to /admin
Theme toggle button visible in navbar (Sun/Moon icons)
Theme toggle switches between dark and light mode
Dark mode: dark background (#030303), light text, neon glow aesthetics
Light mode: off-white background (rgb(250, 250, 248)), dark text, proper contrast
Theme persists after page reload (localStorage key: aetheris_theme)
Footer appears on Privacy Policy page (/privacy)
Footer appears on Terms of Service page (/terms)
Footer does NOT appear on Admin dashboard (/admin)
Footer appears on Discovery Hub (/dashboard) when logged in
Footer appears on Design Vault (/vault) when logged in
Footer appears on Settings (/settings) when logged in
AI quick-access button visible in navbar when logged in
Admin dashboard login works with meta360d@gmail.com / Adimnaetheris
Admin dashboard loads System Overview panel after login
seed_data_creation: Created test user session for authenticated testing: test-user-1774195579106
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign fully tested. DimensionalHero component uses Vanilla Three.js (512 particles) morphing through 1D line → 2D grid → 3D cube → 4D tesseract with 4s hold + 2s transition per stage. Theme system uses ThemeContext with localStorage persistence (key: aetheris_theme). Footer component has data-testid='global-footer' and appears on all pages except / (Landing has its own footer) and /admin. Inner app pages (DiscoveryHub, CreatorStudio, etc.) keep dark backgrounds regardless of theme setting - only Landing, Navbar, and Footer respond to theme toggle.
